2008.issue: [S2008] Version 4.2.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5042.issue: [W5042] Package "@backend/lib" is used in source file(s) (src/app/action.ts) but not found in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/MiRo1310/ioBroker.telegram-menu/blob/master/package.json). Dependency might be missing.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.7.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/MiRo1310/ioBroker.telegram-menu/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
